feedback.text: Hello, I come from the Stop Destroying Games initiative. I think that Europe and its authority must be a bastion of protection for its citizens. Protecting our rights, of which the right to own and enjoy our property (such as video games) is in my view a duty of European power. I also think that, as in other areas, Europe can be a pioneer, an example itself. You can show to the world that it is possible to impose limits on large companies in order to challenge their power and the trust of users. JAI and I always believe in Europe, in you. I count on you.
